headline: Phalhala or Bust: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Phalhala or Bust carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 69.36, led by Ashton Jeanty, Sam LaPorta, and Rome Odunze. The clearest lineup pressure point is the QB slot held by C.J. Stroud at 49.2 C-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Ashton Jeanty (97.0), Sam LaPorta (86.2), and Rome Odunze (77.5).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: C.J. Stroud is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 49.2. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 10 offensive players, with 2 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 73.57.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 10 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
